description: IMD Red Alert: Heavy flooding expected in low-lying areas of Bengaluru Urban — Koramangala, BTM Layout and Bellandur most affected
IMD Orange Alert: Coastal flooding risk in Mumbai — high tide combined with heavy rainfall
IMD Red Alert: Cyclone-induced flooding across coastal Chennai — Velachery and Tambaram at high risk
IMD Yellow Alert: Waterlogging expected in low-lying parts of New Delhi
